exercises.title: Can You Add These?
exercises.content: Which can be added? (1) 10 m + 5 m  (2) 3 s + 7 kg  (3) 20 N + 15 N  (4) 8 m/s + 6 m. Say yes or no.

exercises.title: Check Equations for Homogeneity
exercises.content: Are these equations dimensionally homogeneous? (1) v = u + at  (2) s = v²t  (3) E = ½mv². Write why or why not.
